summary: Completed testing of TV Offline Type replacement and expanded Admin Dashboard. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working - Admin users table, filters, detail dialog, summary cards; TV type form with emissora/dia_horario fields.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/touchpoints/offline-types returns 'tv' type instead of 'midia'
Backend: TV type has campos_extras=['emissora','dia_horario']
Backend: TV type has correct label='Participacao em Programa de TV' and default_fase_funil='Topo de Funil'
Backend: TV type dicas include emissora and dia_horario guidance
Backend: POST touchpoint with tipo_offline='tv' saves emissora and dia_horario fields
Backend: Non-TV tipo_offline clears emissora/dia_horario fields (set to empty string)
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns enriched user data (payment_status, brands_owned, brands_member, touchpoints_count, pillars_count, credits, last_activity)
Backend: Admin users summary includes total_all, new_this_month, paying_users, free_users
Backend: payment_status values are correctly computed (pagante/trial/free)
Backend: Admin users search filter works (filters by name or email)
Backend: Admin users role filter works (filters by role=admin/estrategista/cliente)
Backend: Admin users plan filter 'paying' returns non-free plan users
Backend: Admin users plan filter 'free' returns users with free/null plan
Backend: Admin endpoints require authentication and admin role (returns 401/403 for unauthorized)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard loads with data-testid='admin-dashboard'
Frontend: Users tab is default, showing user table with all 10 columns (Usuario, Role, Plano, Status, Marcas, TPs, Creditos, Cadastro, Ult. Atividade, Acao)
Frontend: Summary cards display (Total, Pagantes, Free, Novos este mes)
Frontend: Search input works (data-testid='admin-search-users')
Frontend: Role filter dropdown present (data-testid='admin-role-filter')
Frontend: Plan filter dropdown present (data-testid='admin-plan-filter')
Frontend: Eye button opens user detail dialog with Atividade, Marcas, Touchpoints, Pilares, Creditos IA stats
Frontend: Payment status badges (Free/Trial/Pagante) display correctly in table
Frontend: Touchpoints form shows offline type dropdown with TV option ('Participacao em Programa de TV')
Frontend: Selecting TV type shows Emissora/Canal and Dia e Horario fields (data-testid='emissora-input', 'dia-horario-input')
Frontend: TV type shows guidance message about registering emissora and dia/horario
critical_code_review_comments: touchpoints.py: OFFLINE_TYPES correctly replaces 'midia' with 'tv' type including campos_extras=['emissora','dia_horario']
touchpoints.py: POST/PUT endpoints correctly save emissora/dia_horario for tv type and clear them for non-tv types
admin.py: GET /admin/users correctly computes payment_status based on payment_transactions (pagante if has_paid>0, trial if trial_ends_at>now, else free)
admin.py: Search, role, and plan query parameters correctly filter users
AdminDashboard.js: User table shows all required columns with proper badges for payment status
AdminDashboard.js: UserDetailDialog shows complete activity, brands, and stats information
Touchpoints.js: OFFLINE_TYPE_ICONS correctly maps 'tv' to Tv icon
Touchpoints.js: Form correctly shows emissora/dia_horario fields only when tipo_offline='tv'
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed touchpoints during testing, cleaned up after tests completed

tv_type_replacement.details: 'midia' type replaced with 'tv' type (Participacao em Programa de TV) with campos_extras=['emissora','dia_horario']

tv_touchpoint_creation.details: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/touchpoints with tipo_offline='tv' correctly saves emissora and dia_horario fields

admin_users_enriched.details: GET /api/admin/users returns payment_status, brands_owned, brands_member, touchpoints_count, pillars_count, credits object, last_activity

admin_users_search.details: search query parameter filters by name or email

admin_users_role_filter.details: role query parameter filters by admin/estrategista/cliente

admin_users_plan_filter.details: plan=paying filters non-free users, plan=free filters free/null plan users

admin_users_summary.details: Response includes summary with total_all, new_this_month, paying_users, free_users

admin_dashboard_ui.details: Users tab default, table with 10 columns, summary cards, filters, user detail dialog

tv_form_fields.details: Selecting TV tipo_offline shows Emissora/Canal and Dia e Horario input fields

context_for_next_testing_agent: TV offline type replacement and admin dashboard expansion fully tested and working. TV type (id='tv') replaces 'midia' with campos_extras=['emissora','dia_horario']. Admin users endpoint at /api/admin/users returns enriched user data with payment_status computed server-side. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_tv_type_and_admin_dashboard.py covers all backend endpoints.
